name: Druidcraft
description: You call upon nature's subtle power. Choose one: cause a tiny flame to burst into existence; predict the weather for the next 24 hours; cause a flower to bloom or a seed to sprout; or create a sensory effect (rustling leaves, sound of wind, faint animal call).
effect: Minor nature cantrip — creates tiny flame, predicts weather, causes plant growth, or produces a nature sound/sensory effect.
notes: Pure utility cantrip — no combat application; analogous to Prestidigitation but nature-flavored
